title: Netherite Totem
description: Change Gold Totem To Netherite Totem.
body:
# Resource Pack 
The *Resource Pack changes the totem's appearance from golden to Netherite.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/eVMOAR2rFOo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
(*it's just an appearance and doesn't add any properties to the totem)
By Xx_yousss_xX
